span.p:
retrieve
Collection.search() call
document search (semantic/keyword/hybrid)
→ documents, steps update

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
grade_documents
LLM evaluates relevance of each document
binary score: yes / no
→ relevant_documents, steps update

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
rewrite_query
LLM query rewriting
vector search optimization
→ question, query_rewrites,
rewrite_count, steps update

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
generate
based on relevant document context
LLM answer generation
→ generation, steps update

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
grade_generation
2-stage verification
① Hallucination Check
② Answer Quality Check
→ steps update

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_route_after_generation_check
check if last step
contains PASSED
